positive: A stylized, central composition of a whimsical forest creature—a bioluminescent fox with fox-like features, adorned with glowing mushroom caps and interwoven vines. The fox is sitting alertly, looking directly at the viewer, with a captivating, gentle expression. The background is a deep, moody twilight forest setting, rendered in detailed line art combined with highly saturated, ethereal glow effects. Emphasize strong black silhouettes against luminous accents of cyan, magenta, and vibrant teal. Style must be high-contrast graphic novel art mixed with enamel pin aesthetics. Centrally framed for apparel printing, flat digital graphic look, vector quality, clean lines, maximum contrast.
negative: text, logo, watermark, messy, grainy, blur, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, oversaturated, low contrast, photographic, gradient, realistic, human face, writing, signature
